headline: Woman's 'Glow Up' Post Used A Filter So Strong Her Own Mother Didn't Recognize Her
summary: Her mom commented 'who is this?' The internet has not stopped laughing.
fullBody: Jessica Filter posted a 'glow up' transformation photo with a filter so aggressive she now resembles 'a Bratz doll and also a different person.' Her own mother commented 'beautiful, who is this?' The comment has 400,000 likes. Jessica has since posted a 'no filter' apology. The apology also had a filter. Her mom has started a support group for 'parents of filtered children.' Jessica is now 'embracing her natural face' — with a small filter.
